headline: Why Elon Musk's SpaceX is a 'three-engine empire' ahead of IPO
summary: Elon Musk's private space venture, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), is valued at over $1.5 trillion as investors await its mega-IPO in 2026. ER Shares COO and chief investment strategist Eva Ados explains why her firm is calling SpaceX a "three-engine empire," identifying its space infrastructure development, Starlink satellite, and possible space-based AI data centers as the company's core components and biggest drivers.

headline: AT&T IoT Safety Push With Zackat Labs W3 Meets Depressed Valuation
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) is expanding its role in industrial safety through a new partnership with Zackat Labs. The companies are launching the Zackat Labs W3 connected safety platform, which uses AT&T IoT connectivity for real-time monitoring and alerts in hazardous work environments. The W3 platform connects wearables and gas monitors to a centralized system designed to support worker safety in the field. For AT&T, this move pushes its IoT business further into mission critical applications, where...

headline: EchoStar Stock Is Trending Higher: What's Going On?
summary: EchoStar Corp (NASDAQ:SATS) shares are gaining Wednesday. Federal regulators cleared two large transactions that allow the company to transfer a significant block of its spectrum holdings to SpaceX and AT&T. Here’s what you should know. EchoStar shares are powering higher. Why is SATS stock surging? The approval removes the final regulatory barrier and confirms that EchoStar can now complete both sales, which together represent more than $40 billion in deal value according to the FCC. FCC Approv

headline: How AT&T’s US$6 Billion Long-Dated Debt Deal and NG911 Tie-Up Will Impact AT&T (T) Investors
summary: In April 2026, AT&T Inc. completed a multi-tranche US$6.00 billion global notes offering with maturities ranging from 2033 to 2066, intending to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes including debt repayment and pending acquisitions. Separately, RapidSOS announced that its HARMONY AI platform is now delivered over AT&T ESInet, integrating real-time public safety intelligence directly into the nation’s most widely deployed NG911 infrastructure.
